display.purpose: Page-level titles only; low ceiling for product UI.

body.purpose: Default UI text; prose caps at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, table headers, nav items.

mono.purpose: QR tokens (cpy_…, brw_…), IDs, timestamps, numeric columns.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift for a resting pressable surface (rare).

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Menus, popovers, dialogs — content that floats off the page.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one and only primary-action color. Pine green fill, near-white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary), transparent 20%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action that sits beside a primary. White fill, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); }

components.name: Gold Badge
components.description: The ceremonial 'current/featured' marker. Used sparingly (the Gilt Rule).
components.css: .ds-badge-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: var(--gold); color: var(--gold-foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Loan/reservation state. Color is always paired with a word — never hue alone.
components.html: Available
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White fill, hairline border, green focus halo. No glow.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); }

components.name: Mono Token
components.description: How an opaque QR copy/borrower token is rendered — monospace, inset chip.
components.css: .ds-token { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); font-family: var(--font-mono), ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: The deep-green nav panel with a gold 'you are here' marker on the active item.
components.html: CatalogCirculationBorrowers
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 200px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--sidebar); font-family: var(--font-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: var(--sidebar-foreground); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--sidebar-accent); } .ds-nav-item--active { position: relative; background: var(--sidebar-accent); } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 4px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 3px; height: 16px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--sidebar-primary); }

narrative.overview: SJA-LMS should feel like a well-kept academic reading room rendered as software: ordered, quiet, and authoritative. The deep pine green of St. Joseph's carries the structure while the gold appears the way brass and gilt-lettering do in a real library: sparingly, only on the thing that matters right now. White is the page itself. Staff are mid-task and often mid-conversation with a patron; the interface earns trust by being exact and getting out of the way, never by performing. Color is Restrained: one workhorse accent (pine green) plus one ceremonial accent (gold) held to a few percent of any screen. The content area stays white and calm; the brand identity lives in a single drenched green sidebar.
keyCharacteristics: Pine green is the only primary-action color; gold is for selection and emphasis only.
White content surface, one deep-green navigation panel for identity.
One type family (Geist) for the entire UI; monospace strictly for tokens and data.
Fixed rem type scale (~1.2 ratio), not fluid.
Status is never color-only; every state pairs color with text or icon.

rules.name: The Gilt Rule
rules.body: Gold behaves like gilt lettering: it touches ≤ a few percent of any screen and only marks the one thing that is current, selected, or needs the eye. The moment gold fills an area or repeats across a grid, the rule is broken.

rules.name: The One-Green Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one action color. If something is clickable-primary, it is Pine Green; if it is Pine Green, it is the primary action. Do not introduce a second button color to mean 'also important.'

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Token Rule
rules.body: Monospace is a signal, not a style. It appears only where the content is a machine token or a column that must align. A label or heading is never set in mono for flavor.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface is flat at rest. If it has a shadow, it must actually float (it opens, it overlays, it can be dismissed). A shadow on static content is always wrong; use a hairline border or a quiet-surface fill instead.

dos: Do use Pine Green (#1a4231) as the one and only primary-action color — buttons, links, active states, focus rings.
Do keep Academy Gold (#c8a126) to ≤ a few percent of any screen, marking only what is current/selected (the Gilt Rule).
Do keep the content area white and calm; let the deep-green sidebar carry brand identity.
Do pair every loan/reservation status with text or an icon, not color alone (WCAG AA, color-blind staff).
Do set QR tokens, IDs, and numeric columns in Geist Mono; keep all other text in Geist.
Do hold body and placeholder text at ≥4.5:1 — use Ink (#1d2b25) and Muted Ink (#5b6b63), never a lighter gray.
Do keep resting surfaces flat; reserve shadows for things that actually float.
donts: Don't recreate dated gov/library software: cramped gray tables, tiny hit-targets, dense forms with no hierarchy.
Don't drift toward a generic AI-SaaS template: purple gradients, hero-metric dashboards, endless identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't build heavy-enterprise density: deeply nested navigation or intimidating control panels.
Don't map gold onto shadcn's --accent token — that is the hover-surface. Use the dedicated --gold / --gold-foreground tokens.
Don't introduce a second button fill color to mean 'also important' (the One-Green Rule).
Don't set labels or headings in monospace for flavor (the Mono-Means-Token Rule).
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left > 1px), gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism anywhere.
Don't put a drop shadow on static, resting content (the Flat-By-Default Rule).
